text: For the joinery & fitting-out package we recommend Artisan Interior Contracts Ltd (F-JF-01) at HK$9,856,000 — the lowest-priced firm, carrying no risk flags, with a clean flagship fit-out closeout record. All three bids levelled cleanly with no arithmetic corrections, no scope gaps, and no exclusions, so the comparison is like-for-like. The recommended price sits below the historical median (HK$10,750,000) and within the band HK$6,250,000–HK$16,250,000. No firm is recommended against.
